DESCRIPTION: Data Governance & Compliance: Best practices: Auto-classification with SYSTEM$CLASSIFY, Object Tags for PII tracking, Dynamic Data Masking with owner rights, Row Access Policies with mapping tables (use IS_ROLE_IN_SESSION not CURRENT_ROLE), Database Roles for sharing, CURRENT_ACCOUNT for share policies, Reader Accounts with resource monitors, ACCESS_HISTORY for audit trails.
